reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements in 2022.

review_content.Placements: Majority of IT companies have visited here for placements in 2022. There are few Mechanical and civil /core companies that came with less packages. Some companies do list job openings but after we apply for them, there is no interview and information about the company. Only 4-5 students got placed in core companies from the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure in Ghraet college are above average. Classrooms are normal. Library is good and all the book are available in it. In labs, some practical equipments are available and some are missing. Canteen’s food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good placement for CS and IT background.

review_content.Placements: Around 70 to 75% of students got placed. The highest salary package is 10 LPA, the average salary package was 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package was 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Byjus, and L&T. Around 50 to 60% of students got internships. The roles offered are analyst, senior analyst, and web developer. There are not much placements from core companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities and good infrastructure. College has a library, playground, Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, labs, and workshop. Hostel food is good with good facilities.

reviews.review_text: There is yet no proper Wi-Fi is available. There are sufficient labs for everyone and have enough equipment's. Classrooms are still not digitalised. There is no medical facility record available. There is a library placed on 2'and floor have enough books for students. There is no specific organisation of sports and games, but this year all branch of B.Tech are invited to participate in ACL (ADESH CRICKET LEAGUE). .

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the infrastructure, placement, faculty, hostel and Wi-Fi facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not so good. The classrooms are wide and with a centralised AC in it. The college has a digital library and loaded with a good collection of books. The food is above average in the canteen. The hostel rooms are compact and comfortable. Hostel accommodation is good, that is up to 3 students in one room with attached bathroom. WI-Fi speed in the hostel is not good. When it comes to the sports, AIT has a big ground where outdoor games are played. This college ha...

reviews.review_heading: The best college in North India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good enough in the various respects. Now they are even much better than our time. Now equipped with new and advanced equipment. All the other facilities are available. The hostel is not on campus but outside the campus. Don't have their hostel facilities for girls.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my decision to join this college. It was a good experience learning here.
reviews.review_text:
This college is located in Gharuan.
This college is a fully Wi-Fi campus.

The library is full of required books.
For sports, there is a basketball court and a volleyball court.
The labs are fully equipped. 

The hostel rooms are poorly managed.
In one room, three to four students have to stay, so it is not a good idea to stay at the hostel. 
The food quality at the hostel is not so good so I prefer to live in a flat near the college.
There is lack of a proper playground in the college where we ...

reviews.review_heading: A bad college. I will not advise anyone to take an admission over there.
reviews.review_text: The condition of infrastructure is same as that of placements. No Wi-Fi, no proper labs, a very small library are available. Forget about any medical facility, and don't even think of sports and games. The quality of labs is too poor. In fact, the labs are just for formality. The quality of the food in the canteen is the worst. The hostel rooms are of average standard. I have faced infrastructure related issues during my college time.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average in terms of fees and ROI for poor students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not good, no standard classrooms, books are sufficient in the library for PTU syllabus, not for GATE and other competitive exams. There is no medical facility. Some sports events are organized. Hostels are not so good. Canteen is average and labs are not upto the B.Tech standard.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for those who can't pay high fees. But there are not many facilities.
reviews.review_text: They say that Wi-Fi is provided, but it is not. Classrooms were clean, but no air-conditioners were installed. Even medical facilities were not provided.  Very less number of sports & games were held. There was no proper equipment for them. Hostels were very dirty. I was a day scholar, but my friend who stayed at the hostel complained every time about the facilities & hygiene of hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is high class. As there are only three blocks as engineering block, management block and hostel. But the design and infrastructure are totally mind-blowing. Bus facility ground and cafeteria with hygienic food is available.

reviews.review_heading: Proper attention to sports and games.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good as per the fee. Workshops are there. Classes are good. Classes are equipped with fans and in some cases ACs. Overall as per the need of students, everything is available but in less number.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty, placement, medium infrastructure, and other facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, sitting arrangements for students are also average, but there is one advantage for those who loves to spend time in AC as the classes are air-conditioned. No proper arrangements of machines in workshops, there are only 2 buildings, one for engineering students and the other for management students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college because fee charges are not much high.

content.Placements: Around 60% of CSE students got placed in top companies. The highest salary package offered is 14 LPA and the average salary package is 4 LPA to 7 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Technook, Wipro, and Mahindra visits our college for placements. Good training is provided by the institute to make students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is average. Classrooms are normal with projectors. There are three labs for our batch. Wi-Fi is not much good with a speed of 1 Gb for every student which is very less and it disconnects many times. Hostel infrastructure is average. The quality of food served in the mess is very cheap. Most of the students don't eat mess food. There are three canteens, one of them is open for hostel students till 1 AM. Medical center is available on campus. Sports and games are the most important things on campus.

review_content.General: The campus was quite pleasant but not very vast. The campus didn't have Wi-Fi facilities. Labs were decent with necessary equipment and instruments, but some of them were not in order. The library was very small and didn't even have relevant references. Sports and games were not active. No physical training staff members were appointed. The canteen was small and we can't even call it a proper canteen. The quality of food was decent. Initially, the institution had hostel rooms for both girls and boys, but after some time, they closed the hostels for boys. Personally, I was a little bit disappointed with the infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The best college, Archana College of Engineering, with all facilities.

review_content.Placements: My seniors were placed in different companies and 70% of the students were placed. The students were placed in blue chip companies(Godrej, Ashok Leyland, BHEL, NTPC, CISCO, Microsoft, TVS) with the lowest pay - 2.5 lacs per annum. The highest pay - 21 lacs per annum. The roles were Engineer Trainee, front office and a manager in the companies. More than 45% got the internship from the college. The highest stipend was 40 thousand per month, the average was 10 thousand per month and the lowest was 6,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has all labs with all facilities. We have a library with all types of books, guides and subject-specific foreign and local author books. For sports, our college is the one with state-level players. All the classrooms, hostel rooms, and the campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The medical facility is good. There is a night canteen on the campus. Food and beverages are quite cheap on the campus when compared to the outside.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The best part of our college is the locality and atmosphere. It is situated in front of a large open field. The faculties and the management are very much friendly to the students and supports in all activities. Tests are conducted on a regular basis which can be both, planned as well as surprise in nature. Although surprise tests are not very common but students try and stay as up-to-date as possible in subjects such as Finance and Economics where you won't know when your knowledge is put to test. Students are not given any handouts as such but most of the teachers share their presentations with them.

review_summary.college_name: R.D. Foundation Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Overall, absolutely it is a good college if you want to work in Indus.

content.Placements: About 90% of the students from our course were placed. The highest salary package offered for students is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our college are Infosys and TCS. Students will qualify for placements based on the courses required by companies. The highest salary package for students in the computer science department is 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is good. About 20% of the students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure provided by our college are absolutely good. There are also 24x7 labs, and they are very good and hygienic. The library has the essential books and the extra books which are required by the students to do study more. The hostel facility is also available, but the food quality is sometimes not very good. Medical and sports facilities are also available in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: College gives you the complete support so you can get the admission in it.

content.Placements: Around 40% of the students got placed in the year 2019. The highest salary package in our college is around 10 LPA, and it was offered by TCS. Many top recruiting companies like Novoinvent, Mobbiloitte, and TCS. The lowest salary package offered is around 2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 2.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: There are bus facilities available for the students who come from the local areas of 40-50 km at a low price, i.e., around Rs. 14,000 per annum. There are pretty labs with better Wi-Fi connectivity. Classrooms are not pretty good. The mess food is not tasty, but it is fine.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: The review of this college is lower because of shortage of students, faculty and zero placement.

content.Placements: No placements were offered. There are no companies visit for the interview till date from starting the institute. The students come from many states for admitting and complete their course with hoping a job. But the placements were offered zero from this institute, and they do not refer any student in any company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this institute is good. The distance of campus from the road is about 800 m. The no. of gardeners is more than the faculty to keep save the greenery of the garden. The food provided in the canteen is very cheap because of the low budget. The campus is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The review about R.D, which is one of the best colleges.

content.Placements: The college has the good placement assistance and is increasing day by day. The faculty members of the placement cell do hard work on the students in polishing their skills according to the industry. They conduct many pre-placement activites for the students so that they didn't get annoyed when they sit in the placement drive in future.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average. We can compromise on the quality of education they provide here. The college has good discipline. The campus has a library, cafeterias, medical room, labs, stationery shop, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Other: I took my B.E degree from this college, and seriously it’s the best college in Modinagar region. First of all, the staff and the faculty here is very much helpful as well as dedicated and hard working. They will never feel you like you are in burden, they will teach you from the bottom level. They know how much knowledge you have and will teach you accordingly. Actually, the Professors are good in all aspects, all of them holds M.Tech Degree. Now moving towards the Infrastructure, it’s also good but still under construction so never mind, they will complete it soon. Now the main thing is fee structure which is very much in your budget, you can talk with the Finance Department about your fees and they will negotiate it. Internal Marks they provide are such that you will never complain to the faculty members. Provides with the best internal and sessional marks, but you have to work hard for that. The Campus is eco-friendly, lush green environment. No pressure for lots of assignments. The College also organizes festivals from time to time. Overall you can say it’s the best one.
